title: 第三幕　甘い香りは変わらない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush back to the academy in pursuit of Fuji
Kiseki after she left the Yasuda Kinen by herself,
and I spot a familiar dark-haired student training
alone.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff! Wheeze! 'Kay, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hm? You're Fuji's trainer, right? Is something
wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me she saw Fuji Kiseki heading toward
the outer perimeter, so I spend the next few hours
outside searching for her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Sorry, I really felt like running, so I came
back ahead of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She greets me breezily. For a moment, it's as if
nothing is wrong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But, just as Hishi Amazon said, something feels
off about her. Something is undoubtedly wrong.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, have I worried you? No need for that. As
you can see, I'm perfectly fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For better or worse, Fuji Kiseki is incredibly good
at acting. She can conceal her negative feelings
perfectly behind her mask.
choice_data_list: (But, now that I think of it...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Whoops...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry! Yeah, I was just lost in thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There have been so many moments that felt off to
me. It's as if she's losing grasp of her impenetrable
facade.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever is bothering her must be serious. As I
realize this, I'm overcome with heavy guilt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If only I'd noticed her behavior earlier. If only if I
was reliable enough for her to lean on and talk
with...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I just want to make some adjustments to my form.
I'll head back after I'm done here, so don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't sense anything was wrong and I made
her face all of her battles alone.
choice_data_list:
I'm sorry if I don't seem dependable enough to
open up to.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
But please, don't force yourself to shoulder
everything alone.

But please, don't force yourself to shoulder
everything alone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's not like that. Please don't make that face.
None of this is your fault!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to burden you with negative
feelings, so I kept it all to myself...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. I'll tell you everything. Let's find
somewhere to sit.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm absolutely terrified of all the
expectations people have put on me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You must think it weird considering how, as an
entertainer, I've always been the center of
attention and had people expect great things of
me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's not that I've never felt anxious before now...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
However, I was always able to convert my
nervousness into something positive.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was able to control those feelings. I thought this
was the path I was meant to be on. But...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The enthusiasm the world met me with after the
end of my classic year was more passionate than I
could have ever dreamed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
News articles were being written on me every day,
magazines were consistently sold out... I was
happy about that, of course...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But, to be honest... I didn't know what to do. Or
how to react.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Still, I was determined to do my best and meet
everyone's expectations. And because I did that,
my dear schoolmate was inspired by me and
chose her own path.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But when I realized that I had changed someone
else's life, I started to wonder.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Am I really worthy of such worship and
admiration?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Even if I am right now...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's only a matter of time before the day comes
when I let her down completely.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The moment I thought that, all the expectations
that I previously found comforting turned into
suffocating pressure.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I've finally decided what path I want to take, and
it's thanks to you that I was able to change my
way of thinking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki fell oddly quiet after the younger racer
thanked her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I kept saying that is what encourages me to go
forward, but I feel like that's not actually the
case.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I can't help but think...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm not actually deserving of everyone's hopes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm weak, and pathetic, and awful.
choice_data_list: You're not. You're none of those things.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...You're so kind.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You hit the nail on the head when you said
something was off with my running today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
While I was running, I realized I was unconsciously
making up excuses for myself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Things like, "I wasn't good enough for the big
events of senior year," or "I still managed to show
everyone a dream just by taking on this
challenge."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wondered what I should do to keep people from
criticizing me if I ran poorly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There I was, standing on a stage everyone has
high expectations for, in a competition all dream
to win... and that was all I could think about.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...I couldn't get those thoughts out of my head.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. I didn't mean to show you this side of
me. You must be so disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She does her best to sound nonchalant, but she
fails to hide the tremor in her voice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel a deep and powerful fear like I've never
felt before coming from within her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People's obsession with Fuji Kiseki is borderline
terrifying. Everyone expects the world from her
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she was the one who said she'd put on a
show for them, the hurricane of fanaticism that
was created in its wake is unbelievable.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's all right. I'll see this challenge through.
Everyone's waiting for me, after all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just... give me a bit. I'll be back to normal in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen Fuji Kiseki so deflated and unsure
of herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems driven by pure obligation, but
considering what happened at the Yasuda Kinen,
it's obvious she'll crash and burn if she keeps
going.
choice_data_list: (I don't want her to suffer any more.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki is a fantastic runner. She's given so
many people their own hopes and dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Traces of her influence have spread wide and far,
and I want to show her that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where are we going?! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A certain someone springs to mind, and I rush
back to the school with Fuji Kiseki seeking her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thankfully, she's still on the field.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff! Wheeze! Huff! I'm not done yet! Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We watch as she sprints up a ramp with all her
energy.
choice_data_list:
It's thanks to you that she's working toward her
future.

It's thanks to you that she's working toward her
future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was in a considerable rut before. She hated
how her own distance aptitude limited her and
had no hopes for her own future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But those eyes of hers, which were previously
clouded with so much anger, are now looking
steadily ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki changed her. She dedicated the
entirety of her precious classic year to her
younger schoolmate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it's not only the young student who gained
something from Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When people are expectant and excited, she puts
on a show that matches their energy.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
U-unbelievable! Did you see how fast she was
going? Fuji Kiseki's a force to be reckoned with!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Right?! She was so mesmerizing, I couldn't take
my eyes off her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When people are anxious and filled with doubt,
she soothes it away with her calm presence.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There. You always look better when you smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter who it is, she always gives them
everything she has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki isn't an entertainer because she can
run fast in races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Charisma and a silver tongue alone don't make an
entertainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In order to give everyone the show they really
want, it won't be enough for me to simply run and
win.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep working on figuring out my
limits!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's an entertainer because she wants more than
anyone to make others happy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I understand now...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I was never alone...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All this time, I was so focused on not
disappointing you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wanted you to always have front row seats to my
shows as my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But, oh, that was just my hubris. You were never
in the audience.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the start, you've been watching over
me from the wings of the stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression relaxes just a bit into its usual
softness as she speaks.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes. I like that plan very much.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry I've been so oblivious. And thank you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's woes and troubles are far from over,
but I know we'll be able to overcome them
together as a team.
